---
title: "Index"
format: 
  html:
    page-layout: full
    toc: false
---

| Day | Description | Materials | Assignment |
| --- | ----------- | --------- | ---------- |
|  1  | **Overview**<br/>Introduction: LangChain, LangGraph, LangSmith. | [[Lesson](./M1/00_intro.qmd)]<br/>[[Case Studies](./M1/case-studies.qmd)] | [[Assignment 1](./M1/assignment/01_case_studies_ex.qmd)] |
|     | **Agents**<br/>Models, Messages, Prompts, Structured Output, Tools, and Internet Search. | [[Notebook](./M1/01_agents.ipynb)] | [[Assignment 2](./M1/assignment/02_create_agent.qmd)] |
|     | **Sub Agents**<br/> Build a personal assistant with agents as tools. | [[Notebook](./M1/02_subagents.ipynb)] | [[Assignment 3](./M1/assignment/03_subagents.qmd)] |
|  2  | **RAG Overview**<br/>Building a knowledge base. Retrieval pipeline and building blocks. RAG Architectures. | [[Lesson](./M1/03_retrieval.qmd)] |  |
|     | **Embeddings**<br/>What are embeddings and how do they compare similarity? | [[Notebook](./M1/04_embeddings.ipynb)] |  |
|     | **Semantic Search**<br/>Indexing and retrival of documents based on meaning. | [[Notebook](./M1/05_semantic_search.ipynb)] | [[Assignment 4](./M1/assignment/04_semantic_search.qmd)] |
|     | **RAG Chain and RAG Agent**<br/>Answer questions based on specific sources of information. | [[Notebook](./M1/06_RAG_agent.ipynb)] | [[Assignment 5](./M1/assignment/05_rag_agent.qmd)] |
|  3  | **Context and State**<br/>Short-term, long-term memory and context. | [[Notebook](./M1/07_context_and_state.ipynb)] |  |
|     | **Customer Support Agent**<br/>Apply the State Machine pattern to resolve customer issues and escalate to humans when necessary. | [[Notebook](./M1/08_customer_support_agent.ipynb)] |  |
|  4  | **Thinking in LangGraph**<br/> | [[Lesson](./M1/09_langgraph.qmd)] |  |
|     | **Workflow Patterns**<br/> | [[Notebook](./M1/10_workflows.ipynb)] |  |
|     | **LangSmith**<br/> | [[Lesson](./M1/11_langsmith.qmd)] |  |


## [Need Help?](https://docs.langchain.com/oss/python/langchain/get-help)

[Ask LangChain docs AI](https://chat.langchain.com/) or 

Get help from fellow developers and the LangChain team through our active community channels.

- [Community Forum](https://forum.langchain.com/): Ask questions, share solutions, and discuss best practices
- [Community Slack](https://www.langchain.com/join-community): Connect with other builders and get quick help
